note: Per-MTok USD rates for the supported Claude model surface. SNAPSHOT TAKEN 2026-05; values WILL go stale as pricing changes. Override via OPENCLAW_COST_TABLE=<path/to/your-cost-table.json> to point at a freshly-curated table without modifying the package. Used only for the per-goal cost ESTIMATE displayed by openclaw goal --show / openclaw recap --cost; the orchestrator does not use this table for billing or capacity planning.

fallback.note: Used when a model id is not in models or aliases. Equal to the sonnet rate (a sensible mid-tier guess).
